rag_rules: Fix unresolved references by ensuring all identifiers are visible in the current scope or declared as helpers in the same annex.
Resolve type mismatches by aligning helper declarations with the types of the expressions they represent.
generic_rules: When generating AGREE contracts, ensure all referenced identifiers are declared or visible in the same annex scope.
Validate that expression types match expected scalar types (int, real, bool) in AGREE declarations.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Component type annexes are for assumptions and guarantees; implementation annexes are for bindings.
anti_patterns: Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers not present in the model's configured dependencies.
Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type contracts without proper variable or output representation.
